DeleteRecommendationPreferences.description: Grants permission to delete recommendation preferences

DescribeRecommendationExportJobs.description: Grants permission to view the status of recommendation export jobs

ExportAutoScalingGroupRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export AutoScaling group recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

ExportEBSVolumeRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export EBS volume recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

ExportEC2InstanceRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export EC2 instance recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

ExportECSServiceRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export ECS service recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

ExportIdleRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export idle recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

ExportLambdaFunctionRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export Lambda function recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

ExportLicenseRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export license recommendations to S3 for the provided account(s)

ExportRDSDatabaseRecommendations.description: Grants permission to export rds recommendations to S3 for the provided accounts

GetAutoScalingGroupRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get recommendations for the provided AutoScaling groups

GetEBSVolumeRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get recommendations for the provided EBS volumes

GetEC2InstanceRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get recommendations for the provided EC2 instances

GetEC2RecommendationProjectedMetrics.description: Grants permission to get the recommendation projected metrics of the specified instance

GetECSServiceRecommendationProjectedMetr.description: Grants permission to get the recommendation projected metrics of the specified ECS service

GetECSServiceRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get recommendations for the provided ECS services

GetEffectiveRecommendationPreferences.description: Grants permission to get recommendation preferences that are in effect

GetEnrollmentStatus.description: Grants permission to get the enrollment status for the specified account

GetEnrollmentStatusesForOrganization.description: Grants permission to get the enrollment statuses for member accounts of the organization

GetIdleRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get idle recommendations for the specified account(s)

GetLambdaFunctionRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get recommendations for the provided Lambda functions

GetLicenseRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get license recommendations for the specified account(s)

GetRDSDatabaseRecommendationProjectedMet.description: Grants permission to get the recommendation projected metrics of the specified instance

GetRDSDatabaseRecommendations.description: Grants permission to get rds recommendations for the specified account(s)

GetRecommendationPreferences.description: Grants permission to get recommendation preferences

GetRecommendationSummaries.description: Grants permission to get the recommendation summaries for the specified account(s)

PutRecommendationPreferences.description: Grants permission to put recommendation preferences

UpdateEnrollmentStatus.description: Grants permission to update the enrollment status

compute-optimizer:ResourceType.description: Filters access by the resource type
